sqlMap.select: select * from RevenueAreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into RevenueAreaOfPractice(RevenueAOPKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey) values (#RevenueAOPKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# )
sqlMap.select: select RevenueAOPKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RevenueAreaOfPractice where RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update RevenueAreaOfPractice set
where RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from RevenueAreaOfPractice where RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from RevenueAreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey#
sqlMap.select: select RevenueAOPKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RevenueAreaOfPractice where RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
select RevenueAOPKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from RevenueAreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and RevenueAOPKey = #RevenueAOPKey#
